conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Trying to decide on a major before registration closes -- Economics, Computer Science, or Mechanical Engineering.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Economics keeps a lot of doors open but I'm not sure what specific job it leads to.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Mechanical Engineering has a clear path but the course load looks brutal based on older students I've talked to.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: I need to fix the squeaky door in my dorm room, it's been driving my roommate crazy.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Computer Science has felt like the most natural fit in the intro classes I've taken so far.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Fixed the door with some oil, roommate is relieved.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Applied for a couple of internships out of curiosity and actually landed an interview for a CS-focused one.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Still a little unsure since Econ would let me explore more before committing fully.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: My meal plan is running low on funds already, need to be more careful.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Got the internship offer for the CS role, starts as soon as next semester if I take it.

conversation.speaker: user
conversation.text: Declaring Computer Science as my major. Landing that internship offer sealed it over Economics and Mechanical Engineering.

query: What major did the user decide on?
